title: ForgeRock Authorization Policy
description: An authorization policy in ForgeRock Access Management that defines access control rules for resources. Policies specify which subjects can perform which actions on which resources under what conditions.

name.description: Unique policy name within the policy set

active.description: Whether the policy is currently active and enforced

applicationName.description: The policy set (application) this policy belongs to

actionValues.description: Map of action names to their allowed/denied values

resources.description: Resource patterns this policy applies to (may include wildcards)

subject.description: Subject condition defining who this policy applies to

subjectValues.description: Values for the subject condition (e.g., user/group IDs)

condition.description: Environment condition defining when this policy applies

resourceTypeUuid.description: UUID of the resource type associated with this policy

resourceAttributes.description: Response attributes to include in policy decisions

creationDate.description: Creation timestamp in milliseconds since epoch

lastModifiedBy.description: User who last modified the policy

lastModifiedDate.description: Last modification timestamp in milliseconds since epoch
